docket_entries.description: COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $17.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WIHARDJA, HERLINAWATY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WIHARDJA, HERLINAWATY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, YUE YUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIHARDJA, HERLINAWATY $1,083.33 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,135.33, CALIF CIVIL CODE SECT 1916.1 AND CAL CONSTITUTION, ARTICLE 15, SECTION 1 SETS THE ORDINARY LEGAL RATE OF INTEREST AT 7%, WITH A MAXIMUM RATE OF 10% FOR ANY LOAN PRIMARILY FOR ANY PERSONAL OR FAMILY USE. THE LOAN MAY ONLY BE ENFORCED ONLY TO THE EXTENT FOR THE AGGREGATE AMOUNT OF INTEREST PERMITTED BY CALIF LAW. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WIHARDJA, HERLINAWATY
